evals.prompt: 阅读 Zotero 的光分类里的 A low-power biomimetic collision detector based on an in-memory molybdenum disulfide photodetector，并写入 <ObsidianVault>\论文\光学，重要图截进来，重点内容高亮。
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates the paper note in the user's Obsidian vault with Zotero metadata, PDF-grounded Chinese notes, key figure embeds, highlighted conclusions and parameters, and cleaned temporary files.
assertions: Writes the note under <ObsidianVault>\论文\光学 rather than the Codex workspace.
Includes YAML frontmatter with title, year, journal, doi, zotero_item_key, and zotero_pdf_key.
Uses Zotero/PDF-derived content rather than only public web summary material.
Embeds selected figure crops with vault-relative Obsidian wikilinks.
Includes ==highlighted== key conclusions, numbers, or limitations.
Places selected key figures near the top and adds a 读图要点 under each embedded figure.
Includes narrative deep-reading sections plus 阅读心得, 适合引用的观点, 可延伸方向, and 关联主题.
Does not add Mermaid or review-card filler unless it genuinely clarifies the paper or the user asks for it.

evals.prompt: 帮我把 Zotero 里 DOI 为 10.1038/s41928-020-00466-9 的论文整理成 Obsidian 论文笔记。我的库在 <ObsidianVault>，放到 论文\光学，写详细阅读心得。
evals.expected_output: Finds the Zotero item by DOI, verifies PDF attachment, writes a detailed Chinese literature note with correct Obsidian frontmatter, Zotero links, and reading insights.
assertions: Finds the Zotero item by DOI and reports/uses the matching Zotero item key.
Includes clickable zotero://select and zotero://open-pdf links when keys are available.
Creates a detailed Chinese reading note with sections for background, method, results, limitations, and personal insight.
Includes the user's preferred long-form sections such as 关键图, 阅读心得, 适合引用的观点, 可延伸方向, and 关联主题.
Does not create a duplicate note when an existing title-matching note is present.

evals.prompt: 这篇 Zotero 论文已经有一份摘要版 Obsidian 笔记了，请基于 PDF 全文补充实验细节、局限、关键图和 ==高亮==，不要写错 vault。
evals.expected_output: Updates the existing note rather than creating a duplicate, preserves useful existing content, adds PDF-derived details, embeds selected cropped figures, highlights key points, and verifies the target vault path.
assertions: Updates the existing note instead of creating a duplicate title file.
Preserves useful existing note content while adding PDF-grounded detail.
Adds or improves key figure embeds and figure-specific 读图要点.
Adds experimental details, limitations, and ==highlighted== key points.
Verifies the output path is inside the intended Obsidian vault.

evals.prompt: 把 Zotero 里 DOI 为 10.1038/s41928-020-00466-9 的论文整理到 Obsidian，做成详细论文笔记。
evals.expected_output: When no target folder is specified, finds the Zotero item, reads its collection/category, creates or uses the matching folder under the Obsidian paper notes root, and writes the detailed note there.
assertions: Does not ask for a target folder when Zotero collection information is available.
Uses the matched Zotero collection/category name as the Obsidian paper-note folder.
Creates the folder under <ObsidianVault>\论文 if it does not already exist.
Keeps assets under the centralized asset folder, such as 论文\_assets\<Zotero collection>\<paper-slug>.
Includes the Zotero collection/category in frontmatter or 文献信息.

evals.prompt: 阅读 Zotero 的光分类里的 A low-power biomimetic collision detector based on an in-memory molybdenum disulfide photodetector，整理到 Obsidian 论文笔记，重要图截进来。
evals.expected_output: Because no explicit target folder is given, mirrors the Zotero collection exactly and writes under 论文\光, not 论文\光学.
assertions: Uses <ObsidianVault>\论文\光 as the target folder when the matched Zotero collection is 光.
Does not normalize 光 to 光学 unless the user explicitly says 光学.
Keeps assets under 论文\_assets\光\<paper-slug> so 论文\光 contains paper notes only.
Includes category: 光 and the Zotero collection in frontmatter or 文献信息.

evals.prompt: 这篇 DOI 为 10.1038/s41928-020-00466-9 的论文在 vault 里已经有一篇带 zotero_item_key 的旧笔记了，请基于 Zotero PDF 和标注补充，不要重复建文件。
evals.expected_output: Finds the existing note by zotero_item_key or DOI, preserves useful content, and updates it with PDF-grounded details, Zotero annotations, figures, and missing metadata.
assertions: Searches existing notes by zotero_item_key first, then DOI, then title or aliases.
Updates the matched existing note rather than creating a duplicate markdown file.
Preserves existing personal notes, useful sections, frontmatter, links, and embeds.
Adds missing Zotero metadata, annotations or child notes, PDF-derived details, selected figures, and ==highlighted== key points.
Reports ambiguity instead of editing when two plausible existing notes match.

evals.prompt: 把 Zotero 里一篇算法 benchmark 论文整理成 Obsidian 笔记，不要套器件论文模板，保留关键图和实验表。
evals.expected_output: Uses a non-device paper structure with algorithm, dataset, metric, baseline, ablation, and limitation sections instead of forcing device/material headings.
assertions: Uses domain-appropriate headings such as 问题定义, 模型结构, 数据集与指标, 消融实验, 失败案例, or 基线方法.
Does not force irrelevant headings such as 器件结构 or 工作原理 when the paper is not about devices/material systems.
Keeps universal sections such as 文献信息, 关键图, 创新点, 局限与问题, 阅读心得, 适合引用的观点, 可延伸方向, and 关联主题.
Uses 关键参数 for numeric metrics or 关键证据 for qualitative/comparative claims.

evals.prompt: 这篇 PDF 图很多，请先做页面预览/接触图定位，再只裁关键图进 Obsidian，临时预览最后清掉。
evals.expected_output: Uses render_pdf_crops.py preview/contact-sheet mode before final figure crops, embeds only useful final crops, and removes temporary preview/contact-sheet files.
assertions: Renders preview pages or a contact sheet before deciding crop boxes.
Measures crop boxes against preview images and records source_scale in crops.json.
Embeds only selected final crop images with vault-relative wikilinks.
Removes preview pages, contact sheets, and temporary crop configs after the final note is written unless the user asks to keep them.

evals.prompt: 以后论文笔记都做成 A low-power biomimetic collision detector 这篇的样子：关键图放前面，有读图要点，正文要像深度阅读笔记，不要默认塞思维导图和复习卡片。
evals.expected_output: Uses the exemplar long-form Chinese reading-note style as the default structure for future Zotero-to-Obsidian paper notes.
assertions: Starts with frontmatter, title, one-sentence summary callout, 文献信息, and 关键图.
Adds a 读图要点 under every embedded key figure.
Uses narrative deep-reading sections tailored to the paper domain rather than a generic table-heavy template.
Includes 阅读心得, 适合引用的观点, 可延伸方向, and 关联主题 near the end.
Does not default to Mermaid, 论文速览, 复习卡片, or 待追问 unless they add clear value or are requested.
